title: Technical Specialist - Licensed Plumber
description:
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

Preventive and Corrective Maintenance

  • Perform preventive and corrective maintenance for Mechanical & P&S
  • Conduct routine checks and inspections
  • Replace and repair faulty components
  • Record all required readings and measurements
  • Update test sheets, asset records, and maintenance logs.
  • Attend to service requests and reactive maintenance tasks promptly to minimise downtime.
  • Conduct inspections and monitor system performance to ensure compliance with operational standards.
  • Maintain testing tools ensuring calibration and readiness.
  • Keep clear documentation for compliance and audits.
  • Perform variation work as required by the superior


Technical Support and Reporting

  • Assist in troubleshooting equipment faults and implementing appropriate corrective measures.
  • Ensure compliance with Singapore Standards, code of practices & local authority codes.
  • Prepare inspection reports, RA & PTW documentation.
  • Reviewing and amending drawings when required
  • Record maintenance works in checklists, logbooks, and CMMS where applicable.
  • Support supervisors or engineers in preparing maintenance reports and documentation.
  • Conduct Training as and when required

Safety and Compliance

  • Observe all Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) regulations and site safety procedures.
  • Use the correct tools, PPE, and permits for each maintenance activity.
  • Report safety hazards, near misses, and incidents immediately.

Teamwork and Service Quality

  • Work collaboratively with internal teams, clients, and contractors to achieve operational excellence.
  • Maintain professionalism and uphold the company’s service quality standards at all times.

QUALIFICATIONS & EXPERIENCE

  • Valid License Plumber certification. Newly certified or certification in process and have passed all the exams required is also welcome to apply.
  • NITEC / Higher NITEC / Diploma in Mechanical/Building Services Engineering.
  • Minimum 3 years in construction/installation of Electrical services of experience in facilities or building maintenance environment.
  • Knowledge of building systems such as ACMV, BMS, electrical, plumbing, and fire systems.
  • Familiarity with CMMS or work order systems preferred.
  • Class 3 driving licence (advantageous).
  • Engineering license certifications or CFME certifications (advantageous)

postedCompany.name: OCS GROUP (S) FACILITY SERVICES PTE. LTD.
